title: Marquis de Sade's Justine
writer: Marquis de Sade, Harry Alan Towers, Arpad DeRiso
actors: Klaus Kinski, Romina Power, Maria Rohm
plot: Penniless and separated from her sister, a beautiful, chaste orphan must endure an endless parade of villains, perverts and degenerates who covet her virtue and life.
country: Liechtenstein, West Germany, Italy, United States
